name: minerva-get-groups

outputs.description: The ID of the group. Minerva.Group.Name The name of the group.
outputs.name: Minerva.Group.Id

outputs.description: The policy applied to the group. Minerva.Group.PolicyVersion The policy version applied to the group.
outputs.name: Minerva.Group.Policy

outputs.description: The settings applied to the group. Minerva.Group.Endpoints The number of endpoints in the group.
outputs.name: Minerva.Group.EndpointSettings

outputs.description: The comment the group creator added. Minerva.Group.CreationTime date
outputs.name: Minerva.Group.Comment
The time the group was created.
